title: U.S. Strikes Iran for Second Day, as War Heats Back Up
summary_full: President Trump said that the Iranians were taking “too long to negotiate” a deal to end the conflict launched by the United States and Israel four months ago.
summary_public: President Trump said that the Iranians were taking “too long to negotiate” a deal to end the conflict launched by the United States and Israel four months ago.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: conflict launched by the United States and Israel four months ago
